tasks.title: Identify and remove dead code across the codebase
tasks.description:
Perform a comprehensive dead code analysis and cleanup:

1. Scan all TypeScript/JavaScript files in src/ for:
   - Unused imports
   - Unused functions and variables
   - Unused React components
   - Unreferenced exports
   - Commented-out code blocks

2. Scan all CSS files for:
   - Unused class selectors
   - Unused CSS rules
   - Dead style definitions

3. Check for:
   - Unreachable code paths
   - Duplicate code
   - Unused type definitions

4. Remove all identified dead code while ensuring:
   - No broken imports or references
   - All remaining code is properly connected
   - Tests are updated if any test utilities are removed

5. Focus on files in:
   - src/components/
   - src/pages/
   - src/sections/
   - src/*.css

Use TypeScript compiler and ESLint to help identify unused code. Verify that the application still compiles after cleanup.
acceptance_criteria: All unused functions and components are removed
All unused CSS rules are removed

tasks.title: Validate codebase after dead code removal
tasks.description:
Run comprehensive validation to ensure the dead code cleanup didn't break functionality:

1. Run the complete test suite: npx vitest run
2. Verify build succeeds: npm run build
3. Verify dev server starts: npm run dev
4. Confirm zero test failures
5. Confirm no build errors

All tests must pass and the application must build and run successfully.
acceptance_criteria: All tests pass with zero failures
No runtime errors in the application
